response:
Sure, here's a response to the email:

Subject: Follow-up on Resume for Administrative & Order Entry Specialist Position

Dear Cory,

Thank you for your resume regarding the Administrative & Order Entry Specialist position with Kuebler. I am following up to discuss the best time to connect with you over the phone to clarify the role and determine if it aligns with your interests.

Please let me know if you have any questions or would like to schedule a conversation at your convenience.

Thank you for your time. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,  
[Vice President of Sales & Marketing North America]
